chapter_title.ar: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ أَنْ يَبِيتَ الْإِنْسَانُ وَحْدَهُ وَ الْخِصَالِ الْمَنْهِيِّ عَنْهَا لِعِلَّةٍ مَخُوفَةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 69 – Abhorrence for the human being to sleep alone, and the characteristics Prohibited about it for the reason of fearfulness

text: هُ كَرِهَ أَنْ يَنَامَ فِي بَيْتٍ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ بَابٌ وَ لَا سِتْرٌ .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, and Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Talha Bin Zayd,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having disliked that one should sleep in a house in which there is no door, nor a veil’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah and Muhammad ibn Sinan from Talhah ibn Zayd who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, disliked one’s sleeping in a house which does not have a door or a curtain.’”
